headline: Stop the gain—discipline starts today
summary: You're gaining 0.25 kg weekly when you need to lose 0.63 kg weekly; today establishes discipline before Friday's snacking temptation hits.
details: Eat only Huel pre-portioned meals today—no snacking, no 'just one bite.' Get 40 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill this evening to build momentum and prove execution before the weekend hits. Today's discipline compounds: you either accelerate toward 88 kg or slide 0.88 kg further behind your weekly target.
